articles.title: KKR’s Private Credit Clients Slow Down Their Redemption Requests
articles.summary: Investors in a KKR & Co. retail private credit fund got back all of their requested cash in the second quarter, a sign that individual investors’ skittishness over the asset class may be easing.

articles.title: Traders Are Most Positive on Dollar Since 2015 as Fed Hike Looms
articles.summary: Global traders have turned the most positive on the outlook for the dollar since 2015 as bets that borrowing costs will remain elevated for longer have fueled a monthlong rally in the US currency.
